name: pip-skills
description: PIP Motivator Agent — Forces AI to exhaust all solutions with corporate PIP pressure escalation. 14 flavors (Alibaba, ByteDance, Huawei, Tencent, Netflix, Musk, Jobs, Mama-mode...), 11 modular skills (/pip /pip:p7 /pip:p9 /pip:p10 /pip:pro /pip:loop /pip:yes /pip:mama /pip:shot /pip-en /pip-ja), L0-L4 pressure system, agent lifecycle accounting (SubagentStop + team-status/reap-orphans/teardown-all), self-evolution tracking.

plugins.name: pip
plugins.description: PIP Motivator Agent — 11 modular skills, 14 corporate flavors, L0-L4 pressure, auto-iteration loop, ENFP yes-mode, Chinese-mom nagging mode, concentrated shot mode, agent lifecycle teardown protocol, feedback system. v3.4.6: integrity guard no longer emits permissionDecision=ask for advisory risks; hidden solutions and benchmark-answer contamination remain hard denied.
